positive: A stylized, abstract illustration of a majestic arctic fox sitting against a minimalist geometry background. The fox has an elegant, clean silhouette, rendered in strong contrasting colors of deep ultramarine blue, burnt orange, and ivory white. The surrounding background features intersecting geometric patterns (triangles, arches) that subtly evoke crystalline structures and winter landscapes. The style is sophisticated, combining mid-century modern flat design aesthetics with graphic novel linework. Composition must be centered, with the fox occupying the focal point and the background elements framing it symmetrically. Lighting should be conceptual and even, maximizing contrast and sharp lines, perfect for high-quality screen printing on apparel. Minimalist, high contrast, vector art quality, suitable for DTG/POD printing.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, smudge, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, cluttered, photo, photorealistic, muted colors
